src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Spring Security @Secured annotation usage or ensure compatibility with Spring Security 6+ which requires specific configuration for method security.

Wrap the agent list response in a HashMap to include filter metadata (brands, models, etc.) alongside the data.
Change the detail endpoint from POST with request param to GET with path variable for REST compliance.
Return explicit HTTP 404 status with empty body instead of null when an agent is not found.
